name: Troptions Genesis Membership
description: Genesis-tier membership credentials for the Troptions institutional operating infrastructure platform. Each NFT is a non-transferable proof-of-membership credential issued under the Troptions XLS-20 collection on the XRP Ledger mainnet. Membership confers access to gated platform capabilities, governance participation, and proof-of-evidence audit trails — it does not represent equity, securities, redemption rights, or any guaranteed return.

compliance.legalNotice: This NFT is a non-transferable proof-of-membership credential. It is not a security, an investment contract, a redeemable instrument, or a financial product. Possession does not guarantee any return, distribution, redemption, or specific platform behavior.

tokenTemplate.name: Troptions Genesis Member #{tokenNumber}
tokenTemplate.description: Genesis member credential #{tokenNumber} of the Troptions institutional operating infrastructure platform.
